texto: People will listen to you when you become the ‘Embodiment of Love’ [Prem Swaroop]. When can you become the ‘Embodiment of Love’? When you do not look for laws or rules
autor: When you do not see anyone at fault.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de When you do not see anyone at fault. que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “People will listen to you when you become the ‘Embodiment of Love’ [Prem Swaroop]. When can you b…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, dada-bhagwan, become, com foco em reflexao.
